title: Scarification Ceremony
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Scarification Ceremony''' was a [[Vunakian]] celebration.

==The ritual==
During the ritual the Vunakians would cut their faces with sharp implements without the benefit of any sort of anesthetic, while trying to follow a geometrical pattern. The ritual would result in the Vunakian' foreheads and cheeks being covered with protuberant scars and ritual drawings. A Vunakian's caste could be determined based on the configuration of the scarring across their head. This ceremony caused a level of suffering past the Vunakian's pain resistance thresholds, resulting in brave people, capable of resisting extreme situations.

The Vunakian [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Kohn Doil]] went through the scarification ceremony.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{Mo}}
